description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a prominent sloped hip roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The front facade features a large garage door, a balcony with glass railing, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior walls. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large panes on the ground floor and smaller, rectangular windows on the upper level. The house includes a chimney and a small landscaped area with greenery near the entrance. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of functional and aesthetic elements typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A modern two-story house with a reddish-brown hip roof, large garage, balcony, and asymmetrical windows, featuring clean lines and a mix of white and dark gray walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, balcony with glass railing, main entrance, and landscaped area.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the chimney and plain wall, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary entrance, fewer windows, and a simple patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the roof and chimney visible, mostly solid wall with little fenestration.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small porch, and overhanging balcony above, accented by a landscaped area.
